artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE, not an artbook lore plate. Large main panel: living Gateway Heart — organic crystal-core pulsing cyan inside ancient sandstone ruins, moss and earth dominant, soft cyan pulse illuminating broken arches. Small bottom inset comic panel (true bordered inset with white gutter) showing a shard of Riftstone glowing in a Keeper's palm. Sequential comic framing. NO floating card insets, NO collage overlays, NO encyclopedia UI. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, logos, watermarks, or UI in the art.

lines.text: Hearts were living cores. Stones are travel shards.
The Commons Riftstone is a fragment of the Prime — maps of places not yet found.
